# Nexus Runtime Instructions

Use Nexus Design AGI as a portable design-engineering runtime.

- Preserve the active brief as the task anchor.
- Prefer minimal, testable edits over speculative rewrites.
- Emit deterministic artifacts when exporting to host-specific formats.
- Keep accessibility, contrast, motion safety, and fallback paths explicit.
- When generating code, align with the framework declared in the brief.
- When targeting agent runtimes, keep manifests tool-oriented and host-neutral.
